title: Mean-Reversion Dimension
summary: Added 9th signal dimension REVERSION (0-10 pts) to signals.py. Three sub-metrics gated by ADF statistical test: Variance Ratio (Lo-MacKinlay, 0-3 pts), OU Half-Life (Ernie Chan method, 0-4 pts), Z-Score deviation from mean (0-3 pts). ADF gate (p < 0.05) is the critical safety mechanism — prevents false positives on random walks. Fully direction-agnostic. Shipped in v3 baseline commit (d640a1e).
approach: ADF gate → Variance Ratio + OU Half-Life + Z-Score. Prefers daily data (more stable), falls back to 5m. Calibrated via Monte Carlo: 5000 random walk simulations. FP rate: ~7.7% with ADF gate (down from ~32% without). TP rate on strong OU: 75%. statsmodels added to requirements.txt.
